2681 SE River Rd Unit 10 inspection report excerpts.

Metal roof penetrations have cracked sealant. Plumbing vent flashings are deteriorated.
Gutter leak noted. Downspout drainage needs review.
Living room ceiling panel is sagging and the adjacent kitchen ceiling area is sagging.

Aluminum siding is warped or loose with missing fasteners.
Gaps are present around windows and trim. Manufactured home skirting is damaged.
Window head flashings are missing. Vegetation is against the structure.
Crawlspace perimeter has pest openings.

Bathroom floor discoloration has elevated moisture. Guest bath P-trap is actively leaking.
Showerhead or faucet penetrations are loose. Shower pan-to-floor caulk is missing.
Shower surround drainage channels have improper caulking.
Primary bath toilet has moisture or wax ring concern.
Sink shutoff valves are missing. Corrugated flexible drain lines are present.

Damaged belly wrap noted. Crawlspace access door does not fit properly.
Rodent or pest entry points noted. Dryer vent is disconnected from exterior vent hood.
Insulation visibility is limited.

Heat pump has exposed wiring covered with electrical tape. Air filter is dirty.
Licensed HVAC review required.

Rusted exterior man door noted. Primary bedroom sliding closet door needs adjustment.
Dishwasher was not tested because shutoff valve was off.
Laundry floor dips or damaged linoleum noted. Sink stopper linkages need repair or adjustment.
